Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: 'Identify Yourself' sends a message from the originating unit to the contact requesting the contact to identify itself immediately. Not all units will identify themselves! Whether or not contacts will respond to interrogation is random and messages will be displayed informing you how they respond.

Contacts that 'agree to comply' will immediately be identified on your Tactical Display and remain identified for the rest of the scenario. Contacts that either cannot respond, or refuse to respond, remain unidentified on the Tactical Display. You will need to use other methods to identify them, such as visual ID.

Note: any unit which sends an 'Identify Yourself' message automatically reveals itself to ALL units on the map, including hostile forces! For this reason, always use recon helicopters for this purpose and never use ships or other units which are trying to remain hidden.
